title: helia macrophylla
intro: Helia macrophylla, also known as Heliotropium, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helia macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
